Integrated technology infrastructure

Connect and secure business environments.

Opticable brings backbone cabling, professional WiFi, IT environments, surveillance, intercom, and secure entry into one clearer technical scope.

Request a quoteView all services
Structured cablingProfessional WiFiIT environmentsCamera systemsSecure entry
  • Backbone cabling and structured pathways for cleaner growth
  • Professional WiFi with stronger coverage and device strategy
  • IT environments that support users, workstations, and operations
  • Surveillance and access layers designed as one system

Operational environments

A more directional, more architectural presentation of Opticable.

Field-led deliveryFrom planning to install
Integrated scopeConnectivity, IT, security
Business-readyBuilt for live operations

Services

Three service poles

Inspired by service-group websites, the concept groups Opticable into three clearer business-facing capability areas.

Pole 01

Connectivity and backbone

The infrastructure that gives every other system a cleaner, more stable base.

Structured CablingFiber Optic InstallationProfessional WiFi

Pole 02

IT and operations

The layers that support users, workstations, telecom rooms, and day-to-day business continuity.

IT ServicesIT SolutionsIP Phone Systems

Pole 03

Security and entry

The systems that control visibility, visitor flow, doors, and secure access across the site.

Camera SurveillanceAccess ControlIntercom Systems

Services

Featured interventions

Five high-impact service lines that bring structure, visibility, and control back into the technology environment.

Physical layer

Structured backbone

CAB

The physical layer that keeps the environment organized, expandable, and easier to service.

View service page

Wireless network

Wireless performance

WIFI

Coverage, placement, and tuning shaped around real users, real density, and real building constraints.

View service page

Managed systems

IT environments

IT

Servers, workstations, racks, and business systems presented as part of one practical operating stack.

View service page

Surveillance

Site visibility

CCTV

Modern surveillance systems designed to improve control, traceability, and operational confidence.

View service page

Entry management

Secure entry

ACCESS

Access control, intercom logic, and managed visitor flow for professional environments.

Equipment

Brands we install and support

We work with commercial-grade equipment recognized across the industry.

Ubiquiti (UniFi)
MikroTik
Fortinet
Hikvision
Uniview (UNV)
TP-Link Omada

Execution built for the field

Execution built for the field

Opticable helps businesses design, install, and support the technology infrastructure that keeps their operations connected, secure, and efficient.

Site reading

We assess pathways, rooms, doors, coverage constraints, and building realities before proposing the right system mix.

Multi-system coordination

Cabling, wireless, surveillance, access, and IT support are presented as connected layers, not isolated trades.

Installation discipline

The concept emphasizes cleaner room layouts, sharper detailing, and a stronger final presentation.

Operational follow-through

The goal is not just installation, but a site that stays easier to support and evolve after go-live.

Deployment method

Deployment method

Analyze the site, shape the technical direction, execute cleanly, then hand off a supportable environment.

01

Assessment

We review the site, the current environment, operational constraints, and the systems that need to work together.

02

Design

We define the technical scope, infrastructure approach, device locations, and the right deployment path.

03

Installation

We install, configure, organize, and test the infrastructure with a clean and professional workflow.

04

Support

We help with turnover, optimization, and the next operational steps after implementation.

Industries

Who we support

Professional environments that need stronger technical structure without losing clarity.

Businesses and offices

Structured cabling, WiFi, IT systems, and secure operations for professional work environments.

Commercial properties

Technology infrastructure that supports occupancy, tenant service, and building performance.

Multi-unit and mixed-use sites

Shared-area connectivity, secure entry, surveillance, and practical operational systems.

Developers, contractors, and managers

Technology planning and delivery that fits project sequencing and building realities.

Project Intake

Need a technology specialist for cameras, secure entry, WiFi, or building communications?

Send a quote request with the property type, required systems, and target timeline.

Request a quoteView all services

Opticable serves businesses and managed properties across Quebec, including Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, the South Shore, the North Shore, and the Laurentians.
